_comment: Hand-curated allowlist of facts the owner has personally verified against a real, published source. scripts/trend_analysis.py regex-scans each edition's ai-radar.md for numeric claims and checks them against match_patterns here (case-insensitive substring match on the surrounding text). A hit is reported as CONFIRMED with its source; anything with no hit is reported as UNCONFIRMED, not false. This is a finite, manually grown list, not a live connection to Gartner/McKinsey/Stanford/etc. -- there is no public API for those reports, and having a script query them live would just reintroduce an LLM to 'read' the source, defeating the point.

facts.claim: 40% of enterprise apps will feature task-specific AI agents by 2026
Over 40% of agentic AI projects will be canceled by end of 2027
EU AI Act penalties of up to €35M or 7% of global turnover for prohibited practices
facts.source_title: European Commission — AI Act regulatory framework

facts.claim: Jensen Huang: "we need roughly 1,000x more energy for AI compute"
facts.source_title: Columbia CGEP — Jensen Huang: the power of intelligence infrastructure

facts.claim: Anthropic confidentially filed for IPO after a $65B raise at a $965B valuation
facts.source_title: Fortune — Anthropic confidentially files for IPO

facts.claim: Sam Altman: AI token costs are becoming "a huge issue"
facts.source_title: Tom's Hardware — Sam Altman admits AI token costs

facts.claim: 88% of enterprises reported an AI agent security incident in the last year
facts.source_title: VentureBeat — The enforcement gap (Gravitee State of AI Agent Security 2026)

facts.claim: Machine identities outnumber humans by more than 80 to 1
facts.source_title: CyberArk — Machine Identities Outnumber Humans by More Than 80 to 1
